subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou art He Who, through the radiance of the lights of Thine oneness, hath quickened all created things, and through the effulgence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی انت الذی بتجلی من انوار احدیتک احییت الموجودات و باشراق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement
